episodes.title: Bill Clinton speaks on what he knows about Jeffrey Epstein | FOX 7 Austin
episodes.description:
Former President Clinton was under oath telling a congressional committee what he knows about Jeffrey Epstein. Hillary Clinton testified on Thursday. Both the Clintons and President Trump deny any wrongdoing in connection with Epstein and his sex crimes. Lawmakers are also weighing whether to bring in additional witnesses.


FOX7Austin brings you breaking news, weather, and local stories out of Central #Texas as well as fun segments from Good Day Austin, the best from our video vault archives, and exclusive shows like the Good Day Austin Round-Up and CrimeWatch.

episodes.title: Jeffrey Epstein files: Hillary Clinton wants testimony to be made public | FOX 7 Austin
episodes.description:
Hillary Clinton seems willing to tell Congress what she knows about Jeffrey Epstein and she wants the public to hear it too. She is calling for her question-and-answer session with lawmakers later this month to be televised.


FOX7Austin brings you breaking news, weather, and local stories out of Central #Texas as well as fun segments from Good Day Austin, the best from our video vault archives, and exclusive shows like the Good Day Austin Round-Up and CrimeWatch.
